title: lepisorus boninensis
intro: Lepisorus boninensis, also known as Bonin cliff fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, which is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the group of bryophytes. Lepisorus boninensis has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. Lepisorus boninensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
